cards.label: Schedule
cards.description: Full conference schedule, speakers, and poster session

schedule.title: Accounting for AI in Future BME Careers
schedule.speaker: Dr. Kate Stephenson, Founder, Dyad Engineering

schedule.title: From Concept to Clinic: Building the Evidence That Brings Devices to Patients
schedule.speaker: Dr. Janie Mandrusov, VP Clinical Affairs, VahatiCor

schedule.title: Performance and Safety Verification for Robotic Medical Devices
schedule.speaker: Brian Crews, Staff Hardware Test Engineer, Intuitive

schedule.title: Bringing Medical Devices to Market in 2026
schedule.speaker: Barry Schnur, President & CEO, David Schnur Associates

schedule.title: Building Healthcare Software That Matters: Integrating Technology, Regulation, and Science
schedule.speaker: Alma Lopez, Senior Technical Product Manager, Roche

schedule.title: Deep Brain Stimulation for Neuropsychiatric Disorders
schedule.speaker: Dr. Kristin Sellers, Assistant Professor, UCSF

schedule.title: Hormonal Regulation of Heart Muscle Proliferation and Regeneration
schedule.speaker: Dr. Alexander Payumo, Assistant Professor, San Jose State University

schedule.title: The Usability Gap: Aligning Breast Pump Innovation with Human Reality
schedule.speaker: Cassi Janakos, COO & Co-founder, Healthy Horizons

speakers.name: Dr. Kate Stephenson
speakers.title: Founder, Dyad Engineering
speakers.bio: 25+ years in med tech. Stanford MS & PhD in Engineering. Speaking on how AI will reshape biomedical engineering careers.

speakers.name: Dr. Janie Mandrusov
speakers.title: VP Clinical Affairs, VahatiCor
speakers.bio: 25+ years in cardiovascular technology with 16 patents. Expert in clinical evidence strategy for medical devices.

speakers.name: Brian Crews
speakers.title: Staff Hardware Test Engineer, Intuitive
speakers.bio: 10+ years in robotic medical systems. Specializes in performance and safety verification for surgical robots.

speakers.name: Barry Schnur
speakers.title: President & CEO, David Schnur Associates
speakers.bio: 30+ years in the medical device industry. Expert on regulatory pathways and commercialization strategy.

speakers.name: Alma Lopez
speakers.title: Senior Technical Product Manager, Roche
speakers.bio: Builds AI-enabled healthcare solutions at Roche. Focuses on the intersection of technology, regulation, and clinical science.

speakers.name: Dr. Kristin Sellers
speakers.title: Assistant Professor, UCSF
speakers.bio: Researches intracranial electrical stimulation and deep brain stimulation for treating neuropsychiatric disorders.

speakers.name: Dr. Alexander Payumo
speakers.title: Assistant Professor, San Jose State University
speakers.bio: Cardiac regeneration researcher studying hormonal regulation of heart muscle proliferation.

speakers.name: Cassi Janakos
speakers.title: COO & Co-founder, Healthy Horizons
speakers.bio: Inc. Female Founders 500 honoree (2025). Advocates for human-centered medical device design.
